title: The Datilio File-First Philosophy Explained
summary: Datilio starts where your data already lives—in files—not in a six-month warehouse project.

content.summary: Datilio starts where your data already lives—in files—not in a six-month warehouse project.

body.text: Your Monday CSV is the hero object, not an afterthought to a connector catalog. Upload CSV, Excel, or JSON and get immediate schema preview, row counts, and charts. Governance layers—filters, rules, exports, Talk to Data—attach to that upload instead of requiring migration first.

body.alt: Analytics dashboard with charts on a laptop screen
body.caption: Analytics dashboard with charts on a laptop screen. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Upload CSV, Excel, or JSON and get immediate schema preview, row counts, and charts.
Governance layers—filters, rules, exports, Talk to Data—attach to that upload instead of requiring migration first.

items: No mandatory warehouse to see first chart.
AI scopes to the file you verified.

body.text: Ops, finance, marketing, and founders who live in exports but need more than spreadsheet friction.
File-first does not mean file-only—it means meet teams today while they modernize.
Datilio's product bets on file-first because that is how most business decisions actually start.

meta_description: Datilio starts where your data already lives—in files—not in a six-month warehouse project.
